text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A couple of days before the most festive night of
the year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to my office to find that someone's
decorated it for the holidays!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! Happy Holidays, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember she got the date for Valentine's Day
mixed up too. Does she actually think it's...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Tsk, tsk! I'm not wrong this time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We've got the Arima Kinen race on the 25th,
right? So we gotta celebrate early!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's what Hayahide recommended!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So that's why today, I've got the most amazing
present for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Saying that, she dramatically reveals...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ta-da-DAAA! A winter sports guidebook!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This one book covers everything from necessities
to popular spots for the winter season!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Skiing, snowboarding, snowmobiling... It even has
biathlons and snowball fights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Browsing through, I can tell the information inside
is pretty thorough.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It has advice for beginners too, so it's great if you
wanna try something new!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket knows a thing or two about
sports. If she's recommending it, this guide must
be pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I want you to go and get reenergized!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I like all sports, so I'll come along any time you
want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we look through the book and spend a
great year-end holiday together.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ta-da-DAAA! A snowman-shaped cake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me a magnificent holiday cake in the
shape of a cute snowman.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It snowed last night, so that's where I got the
crash of inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The whipped cream wouldn't stay in place, so it
was pretty hard to make!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I kept at it, and it turned out pretty well,
didn't it? Heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She did all this while also preparing for the Arima
Kinen?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! No, I gotta thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, let's slice this thing up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket picks up a knife, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaah! I can't do it! I can't cut it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This little guy was born just yesterday... It's too
sad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, it takes two hours to convince her that
the snowman would be happier if eaten, and we
finally cut the cake.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Snowman... I hope you're happy that we ate you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether that's true or not, the cake itself is
velvety and perfectly delicious.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So yummyyyy! Thanks, snowmaaan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, I spend a memorable winter holiday
with Winning Ticket.
